checkin.journal:
Been nice day,
Slept in long
Golf with caro and her dad practicing
Listened to Marc Andreassen interview
Sushi samba lunch was very good
We checked Atlantis Royal hotel super nice we spent there 2 hours
Watched a netflix movie, said goodbye to Caros family
Was a nice relaxing day, lots of good vibes, some golf good food cant complain
Inspired by: the new hotel
Didnt like: that I didnt go to bed earlier
Idea: be the most interesting guy in the room tomorrow
